summary: Reconcile repository, worktree, branch, task graph, and thread state after roadmap adoption
acceptance_criteria: Confirm origin/main, the RR0 branch, task graph, goal-mode state, model-routing state, and thread registry describe the same R0 baseline.
Inventory active/stale worktrees and branches without modifying product code or deleting unrelated work.
Record M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 as retained non-active evidence and preserve partial diff/handoff paths.
Confirm the only active lead thread remains 019eff50-c69d-7612-a90b-7024a47e0af5 and stale/not-found threads are not represented as successfully closed.
Do not create R1 implementation tasks.
required_tests: node -e parse all changed JSON files
git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
notes: R0 reconciliation task only; no product implementation or cleanup of unrelated worktrees.
Original M7 renderer work in D:/WebProjects/MonsoonSovereigns must remain untouched unless a later explicit task allows it.
